dji_mavic.title: DJI Mavic 3 (OcuSync 3+)

baseline_classifier.reasoning: baseline: snr=16.0dB, hop_px=2.2, bursts=321, span=0.06, hint='fast FHSS (likely OcuSync / proprietary FHSS)'

dji_mavic.engagement_brief:
(U) BLUF — A DJI Mavic 3 is conducting a reconnaissance mission within 3.2 km of Camp Pendleton, necessitating a response to mitigate potential threats.

(U) Contact Identification — UAS class: DJI Mavic; controller: OcuSync; range: 3.2 km; confidence: 72%.

(U) Threat Assessment — Inferred intent: reconnaissance; rationale: the UAS is likely gathering intelligence on the LOGCOM tenant area based on its operational characteristics and proximity.

(U) Engagement Options (graded against ROE) — 
- [PASSIVE] Monitor the UAS and gather additional intelligence; authority required: OOD approval.
- [NON-KINETIC] Employ electronic countermeasures to disrupt the UAS control link; authority required: OOD approval.
- [KINETIC] Engage the UAS with small arms fire; authority required: higher command approval.

(U) Recommended COA — [NON-KINETIC] Employ electronic countermeasures to disrupt the UAS control link; this option minimizes risk to personnel and infrastructure while addressing the reconnaissance threat effectively.

(U) Engagement Options (graded against ROE):
- [PASSIVE] Monitor and track the UAS to gather additional intelligence; authority: OOD.
- [NON-KINETIC] Employ electronic countermeasures to disrupt the UAS's control link; authority: OOD.
- [KINETIC] Engage with small arms fire if the UAS approaches critical infrastructure; authority: Commanding Officer.

(U) Recommended COA — [NON-KINETIC] Employ electronic countermeasures to disrupt the UAS's control link; justification: this option minimizes risk to personnel and infrastructure while addressing the potential threat effectively.

- [NON-KINETIC] Utilize electronic countermeasures to disrupt the UAS control link; authority required: OOD.

(U) Contact Identification — UAS class: swarm, controller: proprietary, range: 2.1 km, confidence: 0.72

(U) Threat Assessment — Inferred intent: swarm-overwatch; rationale: the swarm formation and operational range suggest a reconnaissance or monitoring capability.

(U) Engagement Options (graded against ROE):
- [PASSIVE] Monitor and gather intelligence on UAS activity; authority required: OOD approval.
- [NON-KINETIC] Employ electronic countermeasures to disrupt UAS operations; authority required: OOD approval.
- [Kinetic] Engage with lethal force to neutralize the threat; authority required: higher command approval.

(U) Recommended COA — Utilize non-kinetic electronic countermeasures to disrupt UAS operations; justification: this option minimizes risk to civilians and infrastructure while effectively addressing the surveillance threat posed by the swarm.
